title: A-Neung Kid Teung Por Sang Kheb
original_title: อนึ่ง คิดถึงพอสังเขป
overview: This movie is based on the true incidents of experience in various schools which reminisce the good old days when we were still in school. There is no way we can go back to those times and places ever again. What we have left now are just memories.
